headline: How The Entergy (ETR) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With New Guidance And Capital Plans
summary: Entergy’s refreshed analyst narrative now anchors around a slightly higher fair value estimate, edging from US$106.65 to about US$107.37. That modest move is tied to updated research that weighs reaffirmed long term EPS guidance, a larger 2026 to 2029 capital plan, and mixed views on sector sentiment and policy risk. As you read on, you will see how these shifting inputs are shaping the story around Entergy and what to watch as the narrative keeps evolving. Analyst Price Targets don't always...
